PowerShell("=== A records for desksetuppicks.com ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName -Name desksetuppicks.com -Type A -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name,IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { "No A records / does not resolve: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "=== www CNAME ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName -Name www.desksetuppicks.com -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name,Type,NameHost,IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { "www does not resolve" })

PowerShell("=== NS \(is the domain registered?\) ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName -Name desksetuppicks.com -Type NS -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name,Type,NameHost | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { "No NS records: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "=== SOA ==="; try { \(Resolve-DnsName -Name desksetuppicks.com -Type SOA -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -First 1\).PrimaryServer } catch { "no SOA" })

PowerShell("=== apex A \(via 8.8.8.8\) ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName -Name desksetuppicks.com -Type A -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress} | Select-Object Name,IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { "apex not resolving yet: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "=== www \(via 8.8.8.8\) ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName -Name www.desksetuppicks.com -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name,Type,NameHost,IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { "www not resolving yet" })

PowerShell("=== apex A at authoritative ns \(ns1.dreamhost.com\) ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName -Name desksetuppicks.com -Type A -Server ns1.dreamhost.com -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress} | Select-Object Name,IPAddress | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { "no apex A at authoritative: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "=== apex A via 1.1.1.1 ==="; try { \(Resolve-DnsName -Name desksetuppicks.com -Type A -Server 1.1.1.1 -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress}\).IPAddress } catch { "none via 1.1.1.1" })

PowerShell("=== apex A at authoritative \(ns1.dreamhost.com\) ==="; try { \(Resolve-DnsName -Name desksetuppicks.com -Type A -Server ns1.dreamhost.com -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress}\).IPAddress } catch { "none at authoritative" }; "=== apex A via 8.8.8.8 ==="; try { \(Resolve-DnsName -Name desksetuppicks.com -Type A -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress}\).IPAddress } catch { "none via 8.8.8.8 yet" })
